title: phyllocephalum ritchiei
intro: Phyllocephalum ritchiei, also known as the 'Ritchie's tree', is a plant species belonging to the family Lamiaceae, commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Phyllocephalum ritchiei include the treatment of fever, colds, and skin infections, as well as its use as an antiseptic and astringent. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems are often dried and used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal purposes.
